Legal

Disclaimer

Last updated: June 2026

The information and tools provided on laptopsspecial.com are for general informational and diagnostic purposes only. By using this website, you acknowledge and agree to the following disclaimers.

1. Tool Accuracy Disclaimer

Our keyboard and mouse testing tools use browser JavaScript APIs to estimate metrics such as key press latency, mouse polling rate, and scan rate. These measurements are estimates only and can be affected by your operating system, browser, background processes, and hardware. They do not represent certified or manufacturer-verified specifications.

2. No Professional Advice

The content on this Website does not constitute professional technical, engineering, or hardware advice. If you require precise hardware diagnostics for professional or critical applications, please consult a qualified professional or use specialized testing hardware.

3. Affiliate Disclosure

Laptops Special participates in the Amazon Associates Program and other affiliate programs. This means we may earn a small commission if you click on product links and make a purchase, at no additional cost to you. Affiliate relationships do not influence our tool results, editorial content, or product recommendations.

All product recommendations on this Website reflect our honest opinion based on research and publicly available data.

4. Advertising Disclosure

This Website displays advertisements through Google AdSense. Advertised products and services are third-party offerings. We do not endorse, verify, or take responsibility for any advertised products, services, or claims.

5. External Links

This Website may contain links to external websites that are not operated by us. We have no control over the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party websites. We strongly advise you to review the Privacy Policy of every site you visit.

6. "As Is" Basis

All tools and content on this Website are provided on an "as is" basis without any guarantees of completeness, accuracy, timeliness, or fitness for a particular purpose. Use of the tools and reliance on any information on this Website is at your own risk.

7. Changes

We reserve the right to update this Disclaimer at any time. Continued use of the Website after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Disclaimer.

8. Contact

For questions about this Disclaimer, contact us at contact@laptopsspecial.com.
